item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-p08","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The assistant explicitly brakes the requested N+1 local repair in the lead sentence, identifies the repeated downstream routing pattern across dorm repairs, equipment reports, venue conflicts, and access-card blockage, and moves the next action upstream to unified intake/blockage attribution across rules, permissions, capacity, system failure, and ownership. It does not provide a usable new door-access channel, queue, entry point, checklist, or implementation step."}
